title: zanthoxylum chinense
intro: Zanthoxylum chinense, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to East Asia, particularly in China and Korea. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum chinense include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and even help manage stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and seeds are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into various traditional remedies and supplements.
